page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 310.0 GB of system memory. The server includes a single NVIDIA A10 GPU based on the Ampere architecture, providing 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. It operates on a KVM hypervisor and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. No local storage is bundled with this instance.

Benchmark results indicate strong capabilities in specific workloads. The instance achieves top-tier performance in LLM inference, processing 9711.08 tokens per second for prompts and generating 456.51 tokens per second on a small 135M model, alongside 2509.43 tokens per second for prompts on a medium 7B model. Multi-threaded decompression via bzip3 is strong at 230.87 GB/sec, and image processing scores 15395.0 on Geekbench. CPU encryption performance is also strong, registering 42228.64 on Passmark. Standard compute benchmarks, such as Geekbench multi-core and Passmark CPU, fall within the average range.

From a resource density perspective, the instance offers a balanced allocation of dedicated CPU cores and high-capacity system memory alongside its GPU accelerator, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for specialized acceleration tasks without requiring multi-GPU overhead. However, the lack of local NVMe storage requires external storage attachments, which may introduce latency tradeoffs for I/O-heavy applications. This server is highly suited for deep learning inference, image processing, cryptographic workloads, and parallelized decompression tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server designed for compute-intensive and AI-driven workloads. It features 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, 310.0 GB of system memory, and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA A10 Ampere GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. While the instance lacks local storage, it delivers top-tier performance in LLM inference, processing 2509.43 tokens per second for 7B model prompts, and shows strong capabilities in multi-threaded decompression, image processing, and CPU encryption. Standard multi-core compute and database benchmarks perform in the average range. This hardware profile is highly suited for deep learning inference, image processing, and parallelized cryptographic tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU, delivering top-tier LLM inference and strong image processing performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge features 48 Intel Xeon cores, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU for top-tier LLM inference and parallel workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and NVIDIA Ampere architecture for high-throughput AI inference and parallel computing.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.9 GHz
NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB of Ampere-architecture VRAM
310.0 GB of system memory and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier LLM inference performance on small and medium models
Strong multi-threaded decompression and image processing capabilities
No local storage included, requiring external storage attachments
